title: salix × podolica
intro: Salix × podolica, also known as the hybrid willow or Polish willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). The bark and leaves of this plant contain salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which is similar to aspirin. The medicinal properties of Salix × podolica have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and ease pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and provide relief from various health conditions.
